'''''Gilded Lily''''' was a yacht owned by [[Rollo Morsai]]. She converted the space yacht into a freighter to earn credits after she was blacklisted from the acting profession.

*<!-- 1990-06-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 6: Tramp Freighters]]'' {{1stm}}
